vocab.meaning: người thích làm việc/chơi một mình, con sói đơn độc
vocab.example: To be honest, I was a bit of a lone wolf as a child, finding more joy in my personal drawings than in team sports.

vocab.word: get into the swing of things
vocab.meaning: bắt nhịp với công việc/hoạt động chung
vocab.example: It took me a while to get into the swing of things when playing with others, but once I did, I was inseparable from my friends.

vocab.meaning: hai người thì vui, ba người thì hơi đông (ám chỉ thích chơi nhóm nhỏ hoặc riêng tư)
vocab.example: I generally preferred playing with just one best friend because I often felt that two's company, three's a crowd.

vocab.meaning: cùng tần số, có nhiều điểm chung
vocab.example: I loved group activities only when I was with cousins who were on the same wavelength as me regarding our imaginary games.

vocab.meaning: sống kín đáo, ít giao du với người khác
vocab.example: In primary school, I tended to keep myself to myself, spending my breaks lost in a world of fiction and books.

vocab.meaning: xây dựng mối quan hệ, kết nối mọi người
vocab.example: Participating in group scout trips helped me learn how to build bridges with children from very different backgrounds.

vocab.meaning: người năng nổ, thích giao thiệp và nhiều bạn bè
vocab.example: My brother was the social butterfly of the family, whereas I was far more content playing solo with my chemistry set.

vocab.meaning: tự lập, tự làm theo ý mình không cần sự giúp đỡ
vocab.example: I liked to paddle my own canoe even back then, choosing to build my own models rather than following a group project.

vocab.word: be a part of the pack
vocab.meaning: là một phần của nhóm/đám đông
vocab.example: There was a certain comfort in being a part of the pack during neighborhood hide-and-seek games; you felt protected.

vocab.word: birds of a feather flock together
vocab.meaning: ngưu tầm ngưu, mã tầm mã (những người giống nhau thường tụ tập lại)
vocab.example: I preferred group activities because birds of a feather flock together, and I loved being around kids who shared my obsession with dinosaurs.
